message:
fix(security): resolve 3 domain separator collisions preventing cross-context hash confusion

- impossible_default: EnforcementAuditEntry.hash() now uses "impossible_default_audit_hash_v1:" (was sharing TokenInfo's domain)
- policy_checkpoint: generic sha256_hex() utility now uses "policy_checkpoint_generic_v1:" (was reusing checkpoint-specific domain)
- retroactive_hardening: CanonicalObject content hash now uses "retroactive_hardening_content_v1:" (was sharing checksum/merkle domain)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
